scripts.dev: concurrently "npm run dev -w apps/api" "npm run dev -w apps/bot" "npm run dev -w apps/miniapp"
scripts.build: npm run generate-prisma && npm run build -w apps/api && npm run build -w apps/bot && npm run build -w apps/miniapp
scripts.start: npm run generate-prisma && npm start -w apps/api
scripts.start:api: npm run generate-prisma && npm start -w apps/api
scripts.db:push: npm run generate-prisma && npx prisma db push
